title: Linguistics Features
description: Linguistic annotations including semantic roles and animacy. Word segmentation and POS tags are added prior to upload in format: token/POS_tag. These features can be manually added or corrected.

categories.name: Semantic roles
categories.description: Semantic roles that can be manually added or corrected on tokens

categories.name: Animacy
categories.description: Animacy classification that can be manually added or corrected
